programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: A plot by Butch and Cassidy causes Pokémon to turn against their Trainers.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash finds a message in a bottle that leads our heroes to search for a rare Onix.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes find themselves on Pinkan Island, home to lots of pink Pokémon.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: An action comedy in the vein of MIDNIGHT RUN about an ex-FBI agent (Jones) and an ex-mob lawyer in the witness protection program (Freeman) having to put aside their petty rivalry on the golf course to fend off a mob hit.

programme.title: Yes, God, Yes
programme.desc: Growing up in the Midwest in the early OOs, sixteen-year-old Alice has always been a good Catholic. But when an innocent AOL chat turns racy, she discovers masturbation and is overwhelmed with guilt. Seeking redemption, she attends a mysterious religious retreat to try and suppress her urges...

programme.title: Cheap Thrills
programme.desc: Craig loses his low-wage job. He heads to a bar and encounters an old friend. The two are roped into a round of drinks by a wealthy couple who engages them in a series of innocent dares in exchange for money. It seems like easy and much needed money, but how far are they willing to go for money?

programme.title: Hesher
programme.desc: Starring Joseph Gordon Levitt, Natalie Portman and Rainn Wilson in a comedic, dark fairy tale about an eccentric, unhinged drifter who appears out of nowhere to help a struggling family deal with loss in the most unconventional of ways.

programme.title: The Young and Prodigious T.S. Spivet
programme.desc: T.S is a 12 year-old prodigy with a passion for cartography and scientific inventions. One day, he receives an unexpected call from the Smithsonian museum telling him that he is the winner of a very prestigious prize.

programme.title: Scales: Mermaids are Real
programme.desc: Mermaids Are Real! Siren Phillips has lived her whole life thinking she's an ordinary girl, but on the eve of her twelfth birthday she learns that she is far from ordinary.

programme.title: Space Warriors
programme.desc: Desperate to follow in the footsteps of his absent astronaut father, 13-year-old Jimmy's dreams come true when he wins one of five opportunities to compete for a scholarship to Space Camp.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Join beloved house pets Bella the cat, Bagel the dog, and the always-feisty Alvin the parrot, for another fun and fact-filled afternoon in front of the TV screen watching their favorite show: Pets! When these three buddies are on the couch itʼs always a madcap and memorable time!

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Kate and Humphrey are two wolves who are trying to get home after being taken by park rangers and shipped halfway across the country. Back home rival wolf packs are on the march and conflict is brewing. Only Kate and Humphrey can restore the peace...

programme.title: Dragon Eyes
programme.desc: (2012) Gritty action starring Cung Le and Jean-Claude Van Damme. Can a mysterious newcomer use his moral vision and fighting skills to save a neighbourhood terrorised by gangs and corrupt cops?

programme.title: Triple Cross
programme.desc: (1967) WWII spy thriller with Christopher Plummer. Loosely based on a true story, bank robber Eddie Chapman gets entangled in spying for both sides during World War Two, becoming a triple agent.

programme.title: Redemption Day
programme.desc: (2021) Action thriller with Gary Dourdan, Serinda Swan and Andy Garcia. A war hero embarks on a daring rescue mission when his wife is kidnapped. As the clock counts down, can he get to her in time?

programme.title: Bunraku
programme.desc: (2010) Martial arts action with Josh Hartnett and Woody Harrelson. A mysterious drifter, a bartender and a young samurai join up against a ruthless leader and deadly assassins.

programme.title: Sunshine Cleaning
programme.desc: Once the high school cheerleading captain who dated the quarterback, Rose Lorkowski (Amy Adams) now finds herself a 30-something single mother working as a maid.

programme.title: Dead Zone
programme.desc: An elite team of soldiers who, to stop the collapse of humanity, descend on a radiation-poisoned town and perform the ultimate stealth mission using high-tech armor and weapons.

programme.title: Only the Brave
programme.desc: All men are created equal… then, a few become firefighters. Only the Brave, based on the true story of the Granite Mountain Hotshots, is the heroic story of one unit of local firefighters that through hope, determination, sacrifice, and the drive to protect families...

programme.title: Terezin
programme.desc: Antonio, an Italian clarinetist, and Martina, a Czech violinist, fall in love during the Second World War in Prague. The two are deported to the Terezin concentration camp, where their history is intertwined with that of many Jews.

programme.title: The Satanic Rites of Dracula
programme.desc: In 1974, Professor Lorrimer Van Helsing investigates a satanic cult on behalf of Scotland Yard, only to discover a plot by Count Dracula to commit global genocide. A.K.A. Count Dracula and his Vampire Bride

programme.title: Tales that Witness Madness
programme.desc: A psychiatrist tells stories of four special cases to a colleague.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: Dracula is searching for a woman who looks like his long dead wife.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A young French soldier cut off from his unit is beguiled by a mysterious woman, whom he learns is the wife of the local Baron - and that she seemingly died twenty years earlier.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: Assassins Creed
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: Two detectives are drawn into a mysterious case where a thief has masterminded a series of bank heists.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: An FBI Agent seeks vengeance on a mysterious assassin known as "Rogue" who murdered his partner.

programme.title: The Bank Job
programme.desc: Robbers target safe deposit boxes worth millions in cash along with a treasure trove of dirty secrets.

programme.title: Adventures of a Taxi Driver
programme.desc: Joe likes the ladies and gets to meet a variety of them in his job as a taxi driver. From dizzy young women to frustrated housewives, Joe fancies them all, and they take a fancy to Joe. If only things were smoother at home for the put-upon cabbie. With his nagging mother, thieving teenage brother, and the attentions of an overbearing girlfriend with ideas of marriage, Joe leaves the homestead and rents the spare room at his best mate's flat. Meanwhile, he continues to find himself in an assortment of humorous sexual escapades until he accidentally becomes embroiled in a jewel heist that doesn't quite go to plan.

programme.title: Me, Myself and Di
programme.desc: After winning the 'trip of a lifetime' to a caravan park in Rhyl, North Wales, unlucky in love Northerner, Janet Brown, is ready for a holiday romance. Unfortunately, following the advice of best friend Diana (Lucy Pinder) - that Janet should pretend to be the opposite of who she actually is in order to find love - doesn't quite lead to the happily ever after she was hoping for. A laugh-out-loud gritty rom-com with a huge ensemble cast including James Lance (Northern Soul, Bronson, Marie Antoinette, Bel Ami), Will Mellor (Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps, Line of Duty), Larry Lamb (EastEnders, The Hatton Garden Job), Marek Oravec (Captain America: The First Avenger), Wim Snape (The Full Monty, Coronation Street), and Katy Clayton (Casualty, Shameless).

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target. A young man (Chris Evans - Sunshine, Fantastic Four ) and a teenage girl with extraordinary gifts (Dakota Fanning - War of the Worlds) take on a clandestine agency in a battle they can win only if they change the future.

programme.title: A Single Man
programme.desc: An adaptation based on a novel by Christopher Isherwood, A Single Man is a romantic tale of love interrupted, the isolation that is an inherent part of the human condition, and ultimately the importance of the seemingly smaller moments in life. Set in Los Angeles in 1962, at the height of the Cuban missile crisis, A Single Man, tells the story of a British college professor (Colin Firth) who dwells on the past and cannot see his future. We follow him through a single day, where a series of events and encounters, ultimately leads him to decide if there is a meaning to life after the death of his long time partner, Jim (Matthew Goode, Watchmen).

programme.title: Imperium
programme.desc: Daniel Radcliffe (Harry Potter) plays Nate, a young FBI agent who goes undercover to expose a radical white supremacy terrorist group. Under a new identity and immersed in a deeply unsettling, hate-filled world, Nate must control his own beliefs whilst identifying the threat and keeping his true motives a secret. Inspired by true events, this compelling story also stars Toni Collette (Hereditary).

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: From director of action blockbuster Lethal Weapon, Richard Donner. Personal demons put cop Jack (Bruce Willis - Die Hard) at rock bottom but he wasn't about to let a witness be murdered on his watch. When he's assigned to escort a petty criminal to testify before the grand jury, a violent turn of events means this down-and-out cop needs to pull it together as he is hunted across New York City.

programme.title: White Mountain
programme.desc: This jaw-dropping climbing, Free Solo-esque documentary is a harrowing story of friendship, bravery and tragedy in one of the harshest environments known to man. 6 years after their trip to Dhaulagiri in the Himalayas to reach the peak of the almost mythical and rarely-climbed white wall, a group of Argentine climbers return to get closure on a fellow climber who was never to be seen again.

programme.title: Level 16
programme.desc: A shocking dystopian thriller, mashing together the disturbing world of The Handmaid's Tale and Black Mirror to stunning effect. 16-year old Vivien is trapped in The Vestalis Academy, a prison-like boarding school. Reunited with Sophia who previously betrayed her, they embark on the horrifying truth behind their imprisonment. Soon running for their lives, they must save themselves or die.

programme.title: Rock-a-doodle
programme.desc: An iconic family favourite from legendary director Don Bluth and featuring the voice of Oscar Winner Christopher Plummer. A contemporary take on the classic fish-out-of-water story as a rooster, who is tricked in to leaving town to seek fame as an Elvis-style Las Vegas singer, teams up with a young boy and a group of barnyard animals on a magical journey to defeat the Grand Duke of Owls.

programme.title: The Movie Star and the Cowboy
programme.desc: (2022) Romance starring MacKenzie Porter and Toby Levins. Actress Isabella is desperate to land her dream role as a rancher - but will learning the ropes in Montana also land her a leading man?

programme.title: A Lifelong Love
programme.desc: (2023) Lyrical love story starring Andrea Brooks and Patch May. When poet Annika tries to reunite her grandfather with his first love, will teaming up with an old flame rekindle another romance?

programme.title: Vote One for Love
programme.desc: (2023) Romance starring Natasha Wilson and Jesse Hutch. Will hearts be won on the campaign trail when political strategist Candace returns to her hometown to help the mayoral candidate?

programme.title: Luckless In Love
programme.desc: Blogger Winnie and sports agent Holden are both dating with the intention to further their career. As their feelings grow, they discover the only people they are lying to are themselves. (2022)

programme.title: The Love Subscription
programme.desc: Lillian comes up with an investment idea to wow her boss but first she must convince her client, Grant her proposal is one he can't refuse. (2022)

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: A self-absorbed realtor enlists the help of his neighbor when he's suddenly left in charge of the granddaughter he never knew existed until his estranged son drops her off at his home.

programme.title: Blind
programme.desc: Bestselling novelist, Bill Oakland loses his wife and his sight in a vicious car crash. Five years later Socialite Suzanne Dutchman is forced to read to Bill in an intimate room three times a week as a plea bargain for being associated with her husband's insider trading.

programme.title: Tell It to the Bees
programme.desc: When mill worker Lydia is abandoned by her philandering husband, she struggles to look after herself and her son Charlie. Local doctor Jean is one of the few to help and a friendship develops that blossoms into a romance that will scandalise the town.

programme.title: Romance and Cigarettes
programme.desc: A down-and-dirty' musical set in the world of working-class New York, tells a story of a husband's journey into infidelity and redemption.

programme.title: Olympic Dreams
programme.desc: In this heart-warming romantic comedy, an athlete and volunteer form an unexpected bond at the Olympic Games.

programme.title: Love, Rosie
programme.desc: Love, Rosie is a heart-warming, modern comedy-of-errors about Rosie and Alex. As each navigates the complexities of life, love, and everything in between, they always find their way back to each other - but is it just friendship, or something more?

programme.title: Lars and the Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars Lindstrom is an akwardly shy young man in a small town who finally brings home the girl of his dreams to his brother and sister-in-law's home. The only problem is that she's not real - she's a sex doll.

programme.title: Elsa And Fred
programme.desc: A withdrawn senior experiences life in new ways when he begins spending time with the free-spirited woman who lives across the hall. Starring: Shirley MacLaine, Christopher Plummer, Marcia Gay Harden

programme.title: Coffee Shop
programme.desc: A small-town coffee shop owner's romance with a struggling playwright from New York is threatened when her shop goes into foreclosure and her ex-boyfriend returns to town to save it.

programme.title: Farm To Fork To Love
programme.desc: A young and talented chef, ALICE (Meggan Kaiser), works as a sous chef at one of the top restaurants in New York. After a disastrous night serving a food critic, she receives an invitation to judge a food competition in honor of the prestigious annual fundraiser for the St. Andrew's Children's Hospital. Alice accepts the invitation despite the dismay of BRETT, her boss who is also her boyfriend. Once she gets to Kansas, Alice is surprised to find her former boyfriend in college, CHRISTIAN (Scot cooper), is amongst the judges. The cooking show and her reconnection with Christian will make Alice reconsider her calling and make her dreams come true.

programme.title: Love Across Time
programme.desc: While inspecting an old British manor for its real estate potential, Chelsea discovers a portal through time that connects with the late 1700s owner of the property. When an accident occurs, the gentleman comes through and gets stuck in the present day.

programme.title: Belle and the Beast
programme.desc: Eric Landry is a cold-hearted man that people have nicknamed "the Beast." Years of anger and bitterness have consumed him, turning him into a selfish man. But Belle Watson is the exact opposite. When her father accidentally breaks a valuable work of art at the Landry mansion, Belles agrees to work for Eric in an effort to repay him and save her father's job. She discovers there just might be more to Eric. Will she find the man within the Beast?

programme.title: Love by Accident
programme.desc: After breaking down on a road trip with her godmother, a woman enlists her mechanic to be her fake boyfriend, but soon their fake relationship isn't so fake after all.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: This Lifetime Original Movie follows the story of pop icon Britney Spears.

programme.title: Obsessions Gone Too Far
programme.desc: Shortly after earning her degree at Northern Kentucky University.

programme.title: The Trip to Bountiful
programme.desc: Featuring Cicely Tyson, Keke Palmer, Blair Underwood. A woman forbidden to travel alone, wishes for freedom.

programme.title: Love in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Vaugier's life turns as boyfriend's ex says he's her child's father.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: This Lifetime Original Movie follows the story of pop icon Britney Spears.

programme.title: Smooch
programme.desc: A rakishly handsome "English Royal" comes to America for an arranged marriage, and ends up being mugged in San Francisco's Golden Gate Park and left with amnesia.

programme.title: The Wrong Patient
programme.desc: Dr. Richards, a successful plastic surgeon, is caught in a narcissistic patient's scary quest for perfection.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori surprises her family with a meal that transports them to Spain.

programme.title: The Perfect Soulmate
programme.desc: A poet with an abusive husband reaches out to a fan for help, only to find an even more dangerous companion.

programme.title: Killer in Suburbia
programme.desc: Gina and her daughter move to a new town, but when she is abducted, Gina must save her and trust no one.

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: From the director of Step Brothers and Talladega Nights comes this utterly hilarious action-comedy starring comedy favorites Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg as two New York City desk cops who take a chance to step up their game and solve a huge crime.

programme.title: This Is The End
programme.desc: The end of the world is coming...and it's going to be hilarious.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer is reluctantly embroiled in a series of outrageous tests by her chauvinistic correspondent, host of a TV segment titled "The Ugly Truth," to prove his theories on relationships and help her find love. His clever ploys, however, lead to an unexpected result.

programme.title: The Gay Amigo
programme.desc: Mistaken for bandits, Cisco and Pancho are captured by the Captain, who releases them to track the real gang. Cisco discovers the true leaders are the editor and blacksmith. Using cunning, he sows distrust between them, gains the blacksmith's trust, and joins the gang, setting up a trap to bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: War of the Wildcats
programme.desc: In 1906, on Oklahoma's Indian lands, a cowboy fights for oil lease rights against a greedy oilman while a pretty schoolteacher steals both men's hearts.

programme.title: Neath the Arizona Skies
programme.desc: A cowboy escorts a little girl, whose mother made her the heir of a cash-able oil company, and must protect her from an outlaw as they search for the girl's father.

programme.title: The Man from Utah
programme.desc: In a horse-riding rodeo contest bad guys want John Weston to lose. When he doesn't go along they add some insurance: a poisoned needle just under his saddle.

programme.title: Outlaw Women
programme.desc: A young doctor is forced by a female outlaw to a town run entirely by women, where men are only allowed to work in or visit the crooked gambling hall. As the town's independence is threatened by notorious outlaws and a new marshal's election, where women have no say, tensions rise, and the doctor becomes entangled in the town's fate.

programme.title: Kill Johnny Ringo!
programme.desc: Texas Ranger Johnny Ringo hunts a counterfeiting ring but gets entangled in a love triangle involving crime boss Jackson, rancher Ray Scott, and saloon singer Annie. With tensions rising, Ringo must convince Ray to testify, but betrayal looms as the true mastermind - Ringo's own partner, the sheriff - is revealed.

programme.title: Long and the Short and the Tall
programme.desc: The story of seven British soldiers who are so concerned with arguing that the enemy has to take second place

programme.title: Don't Bother to Knock
programme.desc: A lively young travel agent's troubles begin when he mislays the key to his flat.

programme.title: Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: The day before he is due to retire an old engine-driver reports his stoker for drunkenness. The man is discharged and threatens to make trouble. As the train is leaving on the driver's last run the stoker boards it, followed by the driver's daughter. During the run the old man discovers what he believes to be an illicit love between his daughter and the new stoker, whom he knocks off the cab. He is himself struck down by his former mate, but the girl is also there, and she is faced with the awesome task of bringing the great train safely to a standstill.

programme.title: Dublin Nightmare
programme.desc: A photographer investigates the murder of his friend that occurred during a Dublin bank robbery.

programme.title: Family Way
programme.desc: Arthur Fitton and Jenny Piper's wedding is a typical North of England working class affair.

programme.title: Mind Universe
programme.desc: Separation, and Meeting: AI Memory Recovery Virtual World "Tomorrow's Today" At 79, Heejin bids farewell to her husband Sunwoo, with whom she spent over 40 years. Desiring to meet her husband again, she encounters Sunwoo in his 30s form, restored as an AI through the Mind Upload system. In order to make the memory data more complete, Heejin awakens the unfamiliar ego of Sunwoo in a void state, and each time she connects, her husband's memories are reset to zero. As Heejin repeatedly meets with her husband while holding onto the memories alone, she gradually becomes exhausted. In the near yet distant future, in the online funeral service ""Our Universe"" provided by AI, Sound, a space explorer, receives news of the death of her father, composer Kim Hyeongseok, while crossing the Sothell Galaxy. Adapting to the contactless era, Sound utilizes an online condolence service app that allows her to engage in video chats with the deceased, who have been uploaded by artificial intelligence, during the three-day funeral period. Invited to the online funeral, Sound's father Hyeongseok and his acquaintances begin to journey through memories together. Though her father was a famous composer, Sound, who always prioritized work, can only watch his actions without being able to offer words readily.

programme.title: My♡Puppy
programme.desc: What would you do if you had to let the one and only family member go? Min-su decides to marry the love of his life, but the moment he proposes, the fiance reveals the truth hidden from him. She is allergic to dog saliva and took medicines when she met Min-su's little brother Runie, the golden retriever. The happiest moment suddenly turns out to be the one that needs a life-changing decision.

programme.title: STARGAZER: ASTROscope
programme.desc: Intimate interviews and an honest look behind the scenes are captured alongside ASTRO'S concert performance in ＜STARGAZER: ASTROscope＞, a compelling film that chronicles a pivotal moment in ASTRO's career.STARGAZER, ASTRO's first concert after three years! Each member is filled with excitement and anticipation at the thought of reuniting with AROHA, but preparing for a live concert amidst busy schedules doesn't prove easy.

programme.title: I am happy
programme.desc: Man-soo burdened by brother's debt mother's dementia lover's departure is put into the mental hospital.

programme.title: Queen of Walking
programme.desc: High school student Man-bok walks 2 hours every day from home to school due to extreme motion sickness disorder. After the teacher's advice Man-bok decides to try out the sports of Race Walking.

programme.title: Mothers
programme.desc: A 32-year-old widow Hyo Jin is suddenly faced with a situation of raising her ex-husband's 16-year-old son Jong Wook.

programme.title: The Old Garden
programme.desc: Hyun-woo steps out of prison after 17 years. His mother reveals to him the death of his lover Yoon-hee.

programme.title: Boy Makes Girl
programme.desc: After the death of his mother, a software programmer on the autistic spectrum follows his own logic in creating a robot to help care for his mother's final unruly nursing client…

programme.title: Containment
programme.desc: Neighbors in an apartment complex realize they were sealed inside by strangers in hazmat suits. The quarantined startturning against each other in an adrenaline-fuelled fight for survival.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: As the human population nears extinction, vampires must capture and farm every remaining human, or find a blood substitute before time runs out. However, a covert group of vampires makes a remarkable discovery, one which has the power to save the human race.

programme.title: The Complex: Lockdown
programme.desc: After being tasked with saving the life of a potential bio-weapons terrorist, two London scientists find themselves in a locked-down laboratory with time - and air - running out.

programme.title: Repeat
programme.desc: A zealous cognitive psychologist dedicates his life to university lecturing. While tinkering with one of his many experiments he stumbles across an unbelievable discovery-a way of communicating with the other side.

programme.title: The Vault
programme.desc: (2021) Thrilling heist movie with Freddie Highmore and Famke Janssen. A crew of thieves plans an audacious robbery of the Bank of Spain using the World Cup final as cover. Will they hit their goal?

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Her Last Breath
programme.desc: (2019) Mystery drama starring Taylor Cole. When a fatal car crash raises red flags, a determined TV reporter and a seasoned detective join forces to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Staged Killer
programme.desc: When a former co-host works his way back into the life of popular TV host Naomi Spencer, the show's success skyrockets, but Naomi's personal life begins to fall apart. Starring Chrishell Stause (2019)

programme.title: The Wrong Babysitter
programme.desc: A mother must revisit her husband's death in order to rescue her daughter who was kidnapped by her neighbour. Starring Daphne Zuniga (2017)

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller SNITCH, Dwayne Johnson stars as a father whose teenage son is wrongly accused of a drug distribution crime and is looking at a mandatory minimum prison sentence of 10 years.

programme.title: See for Me
programme.desc: See For Me is an original, edge-of-your-seat home invasion thriller with a killer twist.

programme.title: Gosford Park
programme.desc: In 2001, Robert Altman (MASH, The Long Goodbye) took the unexpected step into Agatha Christie territory with Gosford Park, a murder-mystery whodunit set in an English country house starring a host of British acting greats and with an Oscar-winning screenplay by Downton Abbey creator Julian Fellowes.

programme.title: Kill The Irishman
programme.desc: Oscar®-winner Christopher Walken, Val Kilmer, and Ray Stevenson star in KILL THE IRISHMAN, the true story of a tough Irish thug working for mobsters in Cleveland during the 1970s.

programme.title: The Put Back
programme.desc: Kuba, Africa 100 AD: Worshippers of Woote curse his idol to protect it. 2000: Ross Crawford comes to Sydney, because he took the idol and the curse has accelerated his aging.

programme.title: The Legend of the Lost
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel set out to find if the legend of the lost civilization in New Guinea is actually true. Unfortunately, they have to team up with Derek Lloyd.

programme.title: Dagger of Death
programme.desc: India, 500 A.D.: A precious dagger is used in human sacrifices to goddess Kali. Sydney must return a relic to India for her fellow hunter, who believes the dagger made him kill his assistant.

programme.title: Last of the Mochicas
programme.desc: On a search for a South American Mochica Indian relic of protection, Nigel and his colleagues get captured by local guerrillas. It's up to Sydney and ally Jason Clark to save them.

programme.title: Fertile Ground
programme.desc: Sydney reunites with her high school sweetheart to track down a Hawaiian fertility idol in Madagascar.

programme.title: Gypsy Jigsaw
programme.desc: Sydney receives a deck of rare Tarot cards from her recently deceased friend. The infamous, previously unmentioned Vulture was after him. Sydney enlists Claudia to help.

programme.title: Three Rivers to Cross
programme.desc: According to local monks, the Famed Jade Empress is hidden in the valley that will be flooded when the Three Rivers Dam's flood gates have their grand opening.

programme.title: Battlefield Earth
programme.desc: Humanity is enslaved by gold-thirsty tyrants, whose 'man-animals' are about to ignite a rebellion.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (2000)
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The Angels (Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore & Lucy Liu) go head-to-head with Angel-Gone-Bad!

programme.title: The Body
programme.desc: A crucified body dated back to the first century A.D is uncovered at an ancient cave in Jerusalem. Trouble ensues as word spreads.

programme.title: Bravetown
programme.desc: Josh is a lost soul with an extraordinary musical talent set on a journey to encounter what he was least expecting but undoubtedly needed most.

programme.title: Waiting For The Barbarians
programme.desc: The Magistrate, administrator of an isolated frontier settlement on the border of an unnamed empire, looks forward to an easy retirement until the arrival of Colonel Joll, whose task it is to report on the activities of the 'barbarians' and on the security situation on the border.

programme.title: The Slaughter Rule
programme.desc: A young man finds solace with a young woman, his mother, and a high-school football coach who recruits him to quarterback a six-man team.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: SURVIVOR is a gripping thriller about State Department employee Kate Abbott, newly posted in the American embassy in London. Kate is charged with stopping terrorists from getting into the U.S. which puts her directly in the line of fire.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: When ex-Government agent Luke Wright exposes the Russian mafia for rigging an illegal fight, they seek revenge on his family and threaten to kill anyone close to him.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: When Joe Braven, a humble logger residing along the U.S./Canada border, is confronted by a group of deadly drug runners in his secluded cabin in the mountains, he must do everything in his power to protect his family.

programme.title: Operation: Endgame
programme.desc: Two rival teams of assassins. One killer day at the office. An all-star cast including Rob Corddry, Ellen Barkin, Zach Galifianakis, Ving Rhames, and Jeffrey Tambor fight to the death to be the last man standing in this hilarious action comedy!

programme.title: Wild Card
programme.desc: Nick Wild (Jason Statham) is a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal professional skills and a personal gambling problem. When a friend is beaten by a sadistic thug, Nick strikes back, only to find out the thug is the son of a powerful mob boss.
